# Admin UX Requirements Checklist: Administration Site Completion

**Purpose**: Validate that administration-site requirements are complete, clear, measurable, and ready for implementation planning.
**Created**: 2026-06-17
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [X] CHK001 Are all administration sections required by the feature explicitly listed and consistently named across navigation, scenarios, and requirements? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001]
- [X] CHK002 Are dashboard requirements complete enough to define setup status, quick actions, and persistent navigation expectations? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003A]
- [X] CHK003 Are create, view, edit, activate/deactivate, order, and delete capabilities specified for every managed record type where they apply? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004, §FR-007, §FR-009]
- [X] CHK004 Are upload requirements complete for both main content and ads, including required metadata, media type boundaries, and rotation overrides? [Completeness, Spec §FR-005, §FR-008]
- [X] CHK005 Are iframe and approved-domain requirements complete enough to describe how iframe content can be configured by administrators? [Completeness, Spec §FR-006, §FR-010]
- [X] CHK006 Are user and role management requirements complete enough to define the administrator's configuration responsibilities? [Completeness, Spec §FR-012]

## Requirement Clarity

- [X] CHK007 Is "persistent navigation" defined clearly enough to distinguish global section access from one-off links or direct URLs? [Clarity, Spec §FR-003A]
- [X] CHK008 Is "setup status" defined with enough specificity to distinguish readiness blockers, warnings, and quick actions? [Clarity, Spec §FR-003A, §FR-013]
- [X] CHK009 Is "where deletion is allowed" clarified by existing product rules or explicitly deferred so implementers know when delete actions must be hidden or blocked? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-004, §FR-007, §FR-009]
- [X] CHK010 Are "meaningful row information" requirements specific enough to define the minimum fields required in each list type? [Clarity, Spec §FR-014]
- [X] CHK011 Are "common desktop and tablet viewport sizes" quantified or tied to measurable viewport examples before implementation planning? [Clarity, Spec §FR-019, §SC-006]

## Requirement Consistency

- [X] CHK012 Do dashboard and navigation requirements align with the two-click success criterion without creating conflicting entry-point expectations? [Consistency, Spec §FR-001, §FR-002, §FR-003A, §SC-001]
- [X] CHK013 Are readiness requirements consistent between dashboard setup status and the separate readiness section? [Consistency, Spec §FR-003A, §FR-013]
- [X] CHK014 Are content, ad, client, and domain management requirements consistent in how they describe active status, ordering, and editable metadata? [Consistency, Spec §FR-004-§FR-010]
- [X] CHK015 Are unsaved-change warning requirements consistent between edge cases, acceptance scenarios, and functional requirements? [Consistency, Spec §FR-021]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [X] CHK016 Are acceptance scenarios independently testable for navigation, configuration, content/ad management, and clear administration experience? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §User Scenarios]
- [X] CHK017 Can "reach every administration section in two clicks or fewer" be objectively verified from the written requirements? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [X] CHK018 Can "complete the basic kiosk setup flow in under 10 minutes" be measured without relying on implementation-specific steps? [Measurability, Spec §SC-002]
- [X] CHK019 Is the 100% configurability success criterion traceable to every required managed area listed in the functional requirements? [Traceability, Spec §SC-003]
- [X] CHK020 Is the 95% usability target scoped to a defined administrator profile and task set? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005]

## Scenario Coverage

- [X] CHK021 Are primary setup flow requirements covered from first dashboard entry through content, iframe, client, ad, and display configuration completion? [Coverage, Spec §US1-§US3]
- [X] CHK022 Are alternate flows specified for administrators who manage existing records rather than creating first-time setup data? [Coverage, Spec §FR-004-§FR-014]
- [X] CHK023 Are exception flows specified for validation, authorization, upload, storage, and missing-media failures? [Coverage, Spec §FR-015, §Edge Cases]
- [X] CHK024 Are recovery requirements specified for readiness blockers so administrators know where to fix incomplete setup? [Coverage, Spec §FR-013]
- [X] CHK025 Are concurrent edit requirements complete enough to define the expected saved state without introducing conflict-resolution ambiguity? [Coverage, Spec §FR-017]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [X] CHK026 Are empty-state requirements defined for each section that can have zero records? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-018]
- [X] CHK027 Are unsaved-change requirements defined for both navigation links and other exit paths such as cancel actions or browser refresh? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-021]
- [X] CHK028 Are unsupported upload, oversized upload, and missing metadata cases addressed consistently between requirements and success criteria? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-015, §FR-016, §SC-004]
- [X] CHK029 Are narrow-screen and large-monitor administration requirements defined with enough coverage for navigation and form layout decisions? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-019, §SC-006]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [X] CHK030 Are accessibility requirements complete for keyboard navigation, visible focus, readable labels, and error announcement across all admin workflows? [Coverage, Spec §FR-019]
- [X] CHK031 Are security/privacy requirements complete for hiding internal file paths, secrets, and raw session data in screens and errors? [Coverage, Spec §FR-020, §SC-008]
- [X] CHK032 Are feedback timing requirements measurable for save, upload, validation, and storage failures? [Measurability, Spec §SC-007]
- [X] CHK033 Are performance expectations for normal admin navigation and form use specified or intentionally deferred? [Gap, Non-Functional]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [X] CHK034 Are assumptions about existing authentication, role model, media storage, upload limits, and approved-domain policy documented and compatible with the feature scope? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [X] CHK035 Are out-of-scope items clear enough to prevent speculative work on display playback, media types, analytics, multi-organization admin, or visual rebranding? [Scope, Spec §Out of Scope]
- [X] CHK036 Are dependencies on existing content/ad/upload behavior explicit enough for planning to avoid duplicating already-approved product behavior? [Dependency, Spec §Assumptions]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
